ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US size equivalent */,
  "fr_size" INTEGER /* FR size equivalent */,
  "it_size" INTEGER /* IT size equivalent */,
  "alpha_size" TEXT /* Brand-specific size (e.g., Alpha) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the conversion entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the conversion entry was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the conversion is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size conversion entry */,
  "shoulders" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the measurement entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the measurement entry was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the measurement is currently active */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversion_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region (e.g., US, FR, IT) */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., United States, France, Italy) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region entry was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the region is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the brand entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the brand entry was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the brand is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, designer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_region_id" INTEGER /* Preferred region for size conversions */,
  "preferred_brand_id" INTEGER /* Preferred brand for size conversions */,
  "shoulders" TEXT /* Preferred shoulder measurement */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Preferred bust measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Preferred waist measurement */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Preferred hip measurement */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Preferred inseam measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user profile was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user profile is currently active */,
  "preferred_unit" TEXT /* Preferred unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, dresses, pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product entry was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is currently active */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size conversion entry */,
  "shoulders" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement for the product size */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement for the product size */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement for the product size */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement for the product size */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement for the product size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product size entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product size entry was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product size is currently active */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversion_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order item was last updated */,
  "price_per_unit" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
